center.name: 澳大利亚政府
center.summary: 澳大利亚政府是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、Black-throated finch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-throated finch (Poephila cincta), or parson finch, is a species of estrildid finch found in grassy woodlands throughout north-east Australia from Cape York Peninsula to central Queensland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The southern cassowary (Casuarius casuarius), also known as double-wattled cassowary, Australian cassowary, or two-wattled cassowary, is a large, flightless, mostly black bird, found in Indonesia, Papua New Guinea, and northeastern Australia
